candidates.why: Appears directly beneath the selected COGS row and, together with 'Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets in Cost of Revenues' and 'Other Cost of Goods Sold and Services', sums to the selected COGS bucket in the populated periods. This indicates it is a component already embedded in 'Cost of goods and services sold', so adding it separately would double count.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: COGS-related depreciation/amortisation component under the selected COGS bucket. Its placement and arithmetic fit show it is already included within 'Cost of goods and services sold'.
Generic row with no visible operating values and no clear linkage as a separate same-level operating COGS D&A line. Not usable for separate add-back.

variables.notes: Selected COGS parent row is a total that already contains the visible COGS depreciation components; no separate COGS D&A row should be added.

candidates.why: This label appears beneath both 'Selling expenses' and 'Administrative expenses'. In each case it behaves as a sub-component of the selected parent rows, with nearby lease-asset depreciation and 'Other ... Expenses' summing to the selected expense bucket. Therefore it is already embedded and should not be added separately.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: SG&A-related depreciation component nested under the selected selling/administrative rows and arithmetically part of those totals, so separately adding it would double count.
Generic row with no visible operating values and no clear mapping to a separate SG&A D&A line above operating profit.

variables.notes: Both selected XSGA parent rows ('Selling expenses' and 'Administrative expenses') already appear to include their respective depreciation components. No separate SG&A D&A should be added. XRD is empty, and there is no explicit R&D row to consider.
